steps.t: Use the Instance Finder to enter 'Sagroth, Lair of Vermin' on any difficulty.
Mapping points can be found in 'Sagroth, Lair of Vermin.' You should find them to complete the map of the sewers.
Thanks to Aighrig's map, Lágsaith's tale became a little less confusing to follow. You should return the map to Aighrig in Bail Avarc.
